/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/X:THE PEOPLE WITHDRAW THEIR MOTION TO REVOKE/X:ACM IS HEREBY TERMINATED/CTORD:GPS MONITORING IS TERMINATED UPON RETURN OF ALL EQUIPMENT TO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/REIN ORIG TC/PROB EXP:01-10-21/
